en: Pairs that consistently beat another pair or full team when they share a match. Included when the winning pair has ≥ 2 wins AND more wins than losses. Pair-vs-pair entries additionally require wins across ≥ 2 distinct opposing full teams.
zh: 在同场比赛中持续击败另一组合或完整阵容的组合。需要胜方 ≥ 2 胜且胜场多于负场。组合对组合的条目还需要在 ≥ 2 个不同对手阵容中获胜。
